creator: asomers@FreeBSD.org
text: The test is broken; CI is just a messenger.  We need to fix the test independently of CI's configuration.  The question is: is this testcase explicitly trying to test a software device?  Or is this some kind of situation where it's really looking for hardware, but falling back to software?  Would the coverage of any other test cases be negatively affected if we enabled the sysctl?
